snippet.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
snippet.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #spiderman #spidermanbrandnewday #trailer  #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

snippet.title: WILD HORSE NINE | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
snippet.description:
In theaters November 6, 2026. 

Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris (John Malkovich) and Lee (Sam Rockwell) are dispatched from Santiago to Easter island by their bureau chief, MJ (Steve Buscemi). Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students (Mariana di Girolamo and Ailín Salas) threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

Directed by: Martin McDonagh
Written by: Martin McDonagh
Produced by: Graham Broadbent, Pete Czernin, Martin McDonagh, Anita Overland

snippet.title: Checkmate (Official Music Video) | BLUE MEDUSA
snippet.description:
BLUE MEDUSA – Checkmate (Official Music Video)

You’ve been asking. Here’s the answer.
This is BLUE MEDUSA — Alissa White-Gluz's new band — and the new era begins NOW.
🎵 Stream & save everywhere: bluemedusa.com/checkmate

Directed by: Vicente Cordero and Alissa White-Gluz

🔔 Subscribe to BLUE MEDUSA: https://youtube.com/@bluemedusamusic

Checkmate

I learned my name underneath the spot lights,
Lost my voice building a throne,
You thought that silence could not testify,
(But I) Heard echoes I didn’t own.

Fake smiles scaffold heavy lies,  
“Take the abuse and bleed clockwise”,
No leash, no more restraint.
I choose what’s real, I choose my name.

I… I walked the chessboard blind.
Delusion is the refuge of cowards.
Black and white, stay in line.
You forgot the Queen holds the most power.

Take aim.
Strategy.
Watch it fall apart.
The Masks slip and the Mirrors break.

Injury,
Turned sovereignty,
I won’t bleed to belong.

I declare checkmate, 
I own the board.
None of your pawns can 
Conquer my world.

I thrive in truth,
While you lose control, 
I learned my worth,  
When I stood alone.

I’m not your product, I’m not an object.
Wounds close and scars do fade.
Turn empty eyes inwards, see what you became?
Listen… every slammed door sounds the same.

Zwischenzug,
End game
They already Know My Name. 

I matter in rooms where nothing’s sold.
The story gets cold.

---

Directed and produced by: Vicente Cordero and Alissa White-Gluz
Production Company: Industrialism

Steadicam: Fabian Tehrani

snippet.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026.

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Trailer 2 (2026) Tom Holland, Sadie Sink, Mark Ruffalo (Concept Version)
snippet.description:
— Attention Viewers ⚠️
— This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for:
— Spider-Man: Brand New Day

— In this concept trailer for Spider Man Brand New Day, Peter Parker portrayed by Tom Holland faces the consequences of living in a world that no longer remembers him, dedicating himself entirely to protecting New York while coping with unsettling physical changes linked to his powers. As his condition grows more dangerous, he seeks guidance from Bruce Banner played by Mark Ruffalo, whose scientific concerns point to an instability that could threaten Peter’s sense of control. At the same time, the emergence of Jean Grey portrayed by Sadie Sink introduces a mysterious force connected to incidents of mental influence across the city, drawing attention from powerful figures such as Tombstone played by Marvin Krondon Jones III, who sees opportunity in the shifting balance of crime and fear. With familiar presences like MJ played by Zendaya and Ned played by Jacob Batalon drifting through his life without recognition, Peter finds himself confronting the cost of his choices, the limits of his humanity, and the possibility that the path to saving the city may require him to become something far different than the hero he once believed he was.

—  Subscribe to Teaser Fox 🎬
—  For inquiries: theteaserfox@gmail.com 📩

snippet.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown | Battle Pass Trailer
snippet.description:
Join Team Foundation or Team Ice King and lead your team to victory to unlock new weapons, items, and rewards during the Season. The winning team at the end of the Season decides the final reward: everyone with the Battle Pass unlocks either Frost-Ready Foundation or Exalted Frost Ice King. 

Get the Pass for 800 V-Bucks or with Fortnite Crew to instantly unlock Exalted Ice King. Pick up the Pass before March 26 at 11:59 PM ET and claim the launch week exclusive Stealth Tech Foundation bonus Style and accessories. 

Level up to earn premium rewards like the Ice Prince Sidekick, Ice King’s Frostwalkers Kicks, and Outfits like The Order (Reforged), Elite Jules, and Bugs Bunny.
